calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-22-2025 Off Calendar

Application For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-05-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:34 a.m. and concluding at 10:00 a.m.

Plaintiff Scott Tierney and Cornenlia TIerney appearing represented by William Idleman via zoom.
Defendant Amir Motazavi not appearing.

Court addresses Counsel for Plaintiff re: it's justification for attorney fees. Court reviews declaration of counsel re: attorney fees.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court reviews Memorandum of Costs.

Court examines Plaintiff Scott Tierney who appeared via zoom and confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiffs Scott Tierney and Cornelia Tierney, and against Defendant Amir Mortazavi as follows:

Damages: $1,337,976.00
Prejudgment Interest: $0
Attorney Fees: $43,837.90
Costs: $858.40
Waiting Time Penalty: $0

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $1,382,672.30

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Matter not reported.

Plaintiff Scott Tierney not appearing.
Attorney for Plaintiff Bill Idleman appeared via zoom.
Defendant Amir Mortazavi not appearing.

Court addresses Counsel for Plaintiff re: a Statement of damages not filed.

The court continues this matter to August 15, 2025 at 9:00am in dept. 505 to allow counsel time to prepare the statment.

Mr. Idleman is to have his witness available and his appraiser available for the next hearing.

Mr. Idleman was reminded to send courtesy copies to the court of any supplemental filings.

MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Garrett Wong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:20 am and concluding at 9:30 am.

Plaintiff Scott Tierney is represented by Cindy Park, Esq. via zoom video conference.
Defendant Amir Mortazavi not appearing.

This matter is continued on the Courts own motion in order for Plaintiff to submit additional pleadings, to obtain an appraiser, and for the availability of the witness.

Good cause appearing, the Court continues this matter to April 23, 2025 in Dept 505 at 9:00 am. (D505)
